heading: Today
text: Slight chance of spotty rain showers, then sun in the afternoon. Highs from the mid 70s to low 80s, mid to upper 80s in the southeast. West wind turning northwest near 10 mph, occasionally gusting 15 to 20 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Occasional clearing with passing clouds. Lows from the low to mid 40s, nearing 50 in the south. Northwest wind at 5 to 10 mph, occasional gusts over the highest peaks.

heading: Thursday
text: Sunny skies north, with clouds retreating south in the morning. Cooler. Highs from the mid 50s to near 60 north, low to mid 60s south. Northwest wind decreasing through the afternoon.
